summary: Split project data files into generated and manual folders.
details: New projects now create `data/generated` and `data/manual` folders.
Duplicating a project copies only `data/manual` and starts the duplicate with an empty `data/generated` folder, so source-table-derived datasets are rebuilt for the new project period.
ArcRhoTri generated datasets now write matching CSV/JSON metadata pairs under `data/generated/<ReservingClassPath>`.
DFM method JSON files, DFM output CSV/JSON sidecar pairs, and dataset notes now live under `data/manual`, while temporary DFM RPC files and ArcRhoHeaders cache cleanup stay in generated storage.
Desktop startup now verifies the backend it launched before loading the UI, preventing a stale server process on the same port from serving old data-path rules.
